- [Contribute to Docs](https://docs.trytrellis.app/contribute/docs.md): How to contribute to Trellis documentation (mindfold-ai/docs)
- [Contribute to Trellis](https://docs.trytrellis.app/contribute/trellis.md): How to contribute to the Trellis project (mindfold-ai/Trellis)
- [Trellis](https://docs.trytrellis.app/index.md): All-in-one AI framework & toolkit for 10+ AI coding platforms
- [Showcase](https://docs.trytrellis.app/showcase/index.md)
- [open-typeless](https://docs.trytrellis.app/showcase/open-typeless.md)
- [Workflow Demo](https://docs.trytrellis.app/showcase/terminal-demo.md): See the full Trellis workflow in action: from brainstorm to ship
- [Trellis for Cursor](https://docs.trytrellis.app/showcase/trellis-cursor.md)
- [cc-codex-spec-bootstrap](https://docs.trytrellis.app/skills-market/cc-codex-spec-bootstrap.md): Bootstrap coding specs with Claude Code + Codex parallel pipeline
- [frontend-fullchain-optimization](https://docs.trytrellis.app/skills-market/frontend-fullchain-optimization.md): Optimize frontend performance with a Web Vitals-driven diagnosis workflow
- [Overview](https://docs.trytrellis.app/skills-market/index.md): Ready-to-use skills for Trellis
- [trellis-meta](https://docs.trytrellis.app/skills-market/trellis-meta.md): The essential skill for customizing Trellis
- [Commands, Tasks & Specs](https://docs.trytrellis.app/start/everyday-use.md)
- [How It Works](https://docs.trytrellis.app/start/how-it-works.md)
- [Install & First Task](https://docs.trytrellis.app/start/install-and-first-task.md)
- [Real-World Scenarios](https://docs.trytrellis.app/start/real-world-scenarios.md): Use Trellis in real engineering work: new products, brownfield repos, refactors, bug fixes, and team rollouts.
- [Cloudflare Workers + Hono + Turso](https://docs.trytrellis.app/templates/specs-cf-workers.md): Full-stack spec template for Cloudflare Workers apps with Hono framework and Turso database
- [Electron + React + TypeScript](https://docs.trytrellis.app/templates/specs-electron.md): Full-stack spec template for Electron desktop apps with React frontend
- [Overview](https://docs.trytrellis.app/templates/specs-index.md): Coding convention templates for common tech stacks
- [Next.js + oRPC + PostgreSQL](https://docs.trytrellis.app/templates/specs-nextjs.md): Full-stack spec template for Next.js applications with oRPC API layer and PostgreSQL
- [open-typeless](https://docs.trytrellis.app/use-cases/open-typeless.md): Step-by-step guide: Building a macOS voice input app with Trellis
